sys_script.description: 2025-01-22 Code Search DEPRECATED: Replaced Intrux Code Search Application THIS FILE WILL SOON BE DELETED

sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>true</action_delete><action_insert>true</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>true</action_update><active>false</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>sys_metadata</collection><condition/><description>2025-01-22 Code Search DEPRECATED: Replaced Intrux Code Search Application
THIS FILE WILL SOON BE DELETED</description><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition/><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>DevOps+ Flush Code Search Config</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/) {

	sn_scoped_cache.ScopedCacheManager.flushScopedCache('devops_plus_code_search_config_metadata', current.getValue('sys_scope'));

})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>markus.kraus</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2024-06-18 07:56:36</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>680d1f2a933202101f07f5f08bba10db</sys_id><sys_mod_count>4</sys_mod_count><sys_name>DevOps+ Flush Code Search Config</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="DevOps+" source="x_424426_devops">0b41a31b97cf2110d70ef207f053afb0</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="DevOps+">0b41a31b97cf2110d70ef207f053afb0</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_680d1f2a933202101f07f5f08bba10db</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>markus.kraus@intrux.ch</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-01-22 08:42:27</sys_updated_on><template/><when>after</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=680d1f2a933202101f07f5f08bba10db"/></record_update>
